name: Garlic, Shrimp, and Vegetable Stir-Fry
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb Snow peas, stem ends removed
1 Red bell pepper, seeded and cut into cubes
1 lb Medium shrimp, uncooked, peeled, and deveined
2 tbsp Hoisin sauce (available in Chinese markets or ethnic section of grocery stores)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook rice according to package directions.
2. In a large nonstick skillet, stir together sherry, broth, soy sauce, sesame oil, garlic, and hot oil.
3. Add snow peas, red pepper, and onion and cook quickly over medium-high heat, stirring, for 2 minutes.
4. Add shrimp and simmer, stirring, for 2-3 minutes longer or until shrimp curls. Do not overcook shrimp.
5. In a small bowl, stir together water and cornstarch. Add to the pan and cook, stirring, for 1 or 2 minutes or until sauce thickens.
6. Stir in hoisin sauce and lemon juice. Serve shrimp and vegetables over rice.
